parameters.command: cat /app/cubeos/claude-context/active-prom-alerts.json 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'; echo '---MAINT---'; cat /home/app-user/gateway.maintenance 2>/dev/null || echo 'NONE'; echo '---CHAOS---'; cat /home/app-user/chaos-state/chaos-suppression.json 2>/dev/null || echo 'NONE'

={{ "echo '" + $("Parse Alerts").first().json.alertsB64 + "' | base64 -d > /app/cubeos/claude-context/active-prom-alerts.json.tmp && mv /app/cubeos/claude-context/active-prom-alerts.json.tmp /app/cubeos/claude-context/active-prom-alerts.json" + ($("Parse Alerts").first().json.isRecovery ? "; rmdir /tmp/prom-triage-lock-" + $("Parse Alerts").first().json.alertKey.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g, "_") + " 2>/dev/null; true" : "") }}

={{ 'ALERT_KEY="' + $('Parse Alerts').first().json.alertKey.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_:-]/g, '_') + '"; LOCK_DIR="/tmp/prom-triage-lock-${ALERT_KEY}"; if mkdir "$LOCK_DIR" 2>/dev/null; then echo "PROCEED"; (sleep 300 && rmdir "$LOCK_DIR" 2>/dev/null) </dev/null >/dev/null 2>&1 & else echo "LOCKED"; fi' }}

={{ '/app/claude-gateway/scripts/run-triage.sh k8s ' + ' ' + JSON.stringify(($('Parse Alerts').first().json.alertname) || '') + ' ' + JSON.stringify(($('Parse Alerts').first().json.severity) || '') + ' ' + JSON.stringify(($('Parse Alerts').first().json.namespace) || '') + ' ' + JSON.stringify((($('Parse Alerts').first().json.summary || '').substring(0,200)) || '') + ' ' + JSON.stringify(($('Parse Alerts').first().json.hostname) || '') + ' ' + JSON.stringify(($('Parse Alerts').first().json.pod) || '') }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ issues: [{ idReadable: $('Parse Alerts').first().json.existingIssueId }], query: 'state Open' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ text: 'Alert re-fired after To Verify. Reopening. ' + $('Parse Alerts').first().json.commentText }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ issues: [{ idReadable: $('Parse Alerts').first().json.existingIssueId }], query: 'state To Verify' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ msgtype: 'm.notice', body: '\u2705 [Prometheus] All clear: ' + $('Parse Alerts').first().json.alertKey + ' — issue ' + $('Parse Alerts').first().json.existingIssueId + ' moved to To Verify', format: 'org.matrix.custom.html', formatted_body: '\u2705 [Prometheus] All clear: ' + $('Parse Alerts').first().json.alertKey + ' — issue ' + $('Parse Alerts').first().json.existingIssueId + ' moved to To Verify' }) }}

parameters.command: ={{ '/app/claude-gateway/scripts/run-triage.sh escalate ' + ' ' + JSON.stringify(($('Parse Alerts').first().json.existingIssueId) || '') + ' ' + JSON.stringify(('Flapping K8s alert: ' + $('Parse Alerts').first().json.alertname + ' in ' + $('Parse Alerts').first().json.namespace + ' (flap count: ' + $('Parse Alerts').first().json.flapCount + '). Auto-escalating.') || '') }}

cat /app/cubeos/claude-context/active-prom-alerts.json 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'; echo '---MAINT---'; cat /home/app-user/gateway.maintenance 2>/dev/null || echo 'NONE'; echo '---CHAOS---'; cat /home/app-user/chaos-state/chaos-suppression.json 2>/dev/null || echo 'NONE'

={{ "echo '" + $("Parse Alerts").first().json.alertsB64 + "' | base64 -d > /app/cubeos/claude-context/active-prom-alerts.json.tmp && mv /app/cubeos/claude-context/active-prom-alerts.json.tmp /app/cubeos/claude-context/active-prom-alerts.json" + ($("Parse Alerts").first().json.isRecovery ? "; rmdir /tmp/prom-triage-lock-" + $("Parse Alerts").first().json.alertKey.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g, "_") + " 2>/dev/null; true" : "") }}

={{ 'ALERT_KEY="' + $('Parse Alerts').first().json.alertKey.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_:-]/g, '_') + '"; LOCK_DIR="/tmp/prom-triage-lock-${ALERT_KEY}"; if mkdir "$LOCK_DIR" 2>/dev/null; then echo "PROCEED"; (sleep 300 && rmdir "$LOCK_DIR" 2>/dev/null) </dev/null >/dev/null 2>&1 & else echo "LOCKED"; fi' }}

={{ '/app/claude-gateway/scripts/run-triage.sh k8s ' + ' ' + JSON.stringify(($('Parse Alerts').first().json.alertname) || '') + ' ' + JSON.stringify(($('Parse Alerts').first().json.severity) || '') + ' ' + JSON.stringify(($('Parse Alerts').first().json.namespace) || '') + ' ' + JSON.stringify((($('Parse Alerts').first().json.summary || '').substring(0,200)) || '') + ' ' + JSON.stringify(($('Parse Alerts').first().json.hostname) || '') + ' ' + JSON.stringify(($('Parse Alerts').first().json.pod) || '') }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: 'Alert re-fired after To Verify. Reopening. ' + $('Parse Alerts').first().json.commentText }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ msgtype: 'm.notice', body: '\u2705 [Prometheus] All clear: ' + $('Parse Alerts').first().json.alertKey + ' — issue ' + $('Parse Alerts').first().json.existingIssueId + ' moved to To Verify', format: 'org.matrix.custom.html', formatted_body: '\u2705 [Prometheus] All clear: ' + $('Parse Alerts').first().json.alertKey + ' — issue ' + $('Parse Alerts').first().json.existingIssueId + ' moved to To Verify' }) }}
